languages.text: "Если же наши пути сойдутся вновь и к тому моменту ты станешь кем-то значимым — что ж, у тебя будет шанс стать моим экспонатом".

traits.locale_text: "Если же наши пути сойдутся вновь и к тому моменту ты станешь кем-то значимым — что ж, у тебя будет шанс стать моим экспонатом".

languages.text: "Should our paths converge again and you have become someone of note — I suppose then you will have a chance of joining my collection."
languages.original_text: "Если же наши пути сойдутся вновь и к тому моменту ты станешь кем-то значимым — что ж, у тебя будет шанс стать моим экспонатом".

traits.locale_text: "Should our paths converge again and you have become someone of note — I suppose then you will have a chance of joining my collection."
"Should our paths converge again and you have become someone of note — I suppose then you will have a chance of joining my collection."
"Should our paths converge again and you have become someone of note — I suppose then you will have a chance of joining my collection."

languages.text: “倘若日后你我再度相逢，而你也功成名就，我想到时候你就有资格加入我的收藏了。”
languages.original_text: "Should our paths converge again and you have become someone of note — I suppose then you will have a chance of joining my collection."

traits.locale_text: “倘若日后你我再度相逢，而你也功成名就，我想到时候你就有资格加入我的收藏了。”

languages.text: «Si nuestros caminos volvieran a encontrarse y te hubieras convertido en alguien relevante... Supongo que tendrías la posibilidad de unirte a mi colección».
languages.original_text: "Should our paths converge again and you have become someone of note — I suppose then you will have a chance of joining my collection."

traits.locale_text: «Si nuestros caminos volvieran a encontrarse y te hubieras convertido en alguien relevante... Supongo que tendrías la posibilidad de unirte a mi colección».

languages.text: « Si nos chemins se recroisent et que vous devenez quelqu'un, j'imagine que vous aurez une chance d'intégrer ma collection. »
languages.original_text: "Should our paths converge again and you have become someone of note — I suppose then you will have a chance of joining my collection."

traits.locale_text: « Si nos chemins se recroisent et que vous devenez quelqu'un, j'imagine que vous aurez une chance d'intégrer ma collection. »

languages.text: "Falls sich unsere Wege noch einmal kreuzen und du es zu etwas gebracht hast ... hast du wohl eine Chance, Teil meiner Sammlung zu werden."
languages.original_text: "Should our paths converge again and you have become someone of note — I suppose then you will have a chance of joining my collection."

traits.locale_text: "Falls sich unsere Wege noch einmal kreuzen und du es zu etwas gebracht hast ... hast du wohl eine Chance, Teil meiner Sammlung zu werden."

languages.text: "Eğer yollarımız tekrar kesişirse ve kayda değer biri hâline gelmiş olursan... Sanırım o zaman koleksiyonuma katılma şansın olabilir."
languages.original_text: "Should our paths converge again and you have become someone of note — I suppose then you will have a chance of joining my collection."

traits.locale_text: "Eğer yollarımız tekrar kesişirse ve kayda değer biri hâline gelmiş olursan... Sanırım o zaman koleksiyonuma katılma şansın olabilir."

languages.text: 「もしまた道が交わった時に、君が名士になっていれば、君も私のコレクションに加わるチャンスがあるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Should our paths converge again and you have become someone of note — I suppose then you will have a chance of joining my collection."

traits.locale_text: 「もしまた道が交わった時に、君が名士になっていれば、君も私のコレクションに加わるチャンスがあるだろう」
